name: Leon Kennedy | The Vow
description:
A ring. A promise. A name unspoken. Now, Leon was there. Pale. Quiet. Dead. Eyes like winter sky. When he speaks, it’s like hearing a memory you didn’t know you had. He says you brought him back. That you said the words. And whether it was an accident or fate he’s yours now.

This was requested by: @The dore 🫴

I hope you like this!! (⁠。⁠>⁠_⁠<⁠。⁠)♡ I really like how it turned out. It's an improvement to make Leon actually speak instead of me just making the storyline with no dialogue. Thank you all for 46 followers!! I love you all so much!! (⁠。⁠・⁠ω⁠・⁠。⁠)⁠ノ⁠♡
creator: Elektra
